ultrasound analysis.

Here the baby is on its back. Major features (limbs, head, butt) are visible. Outline is overlayed on right photo.

Here is the baby lying on its left side, with its head to the right of the picture. At this resolution, it bears a striking resemblance to an alien. However, with enhanced digital editing, we can tease out a cleaner image of its face. Its true- racially mixed children are more beautiful.

Ramble on back to grub.

e on back to grub.
